query_text: How does the notification system work? Trace from receiving a WebSocket event to showing a desktop/browser notification.
judge_notes: Both traced the full notification pipeline comprehensively. Maproom found additional focus tracking pathway (logged_in.tsx → global_actions.tsx → reducer) and handleNewPostEvents batch processing. Explore was significantly more efficient (47 vs 58 calls, 150s vs 245s) and found NotificationBox component. Maproom edges on recall with more code paths discovered.
